chunks.text: MAK/PS ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. S-440 of 2010 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case. 19.11.2025. Syed Huzaifa Shah, Advocate for the Petitioner. ------------------------------------ Counsel pleads that he has no instructions from his client. This is a case from 2010, and the issue involved in this petition relates to a suit filed before the Family Court, the plaint of which was returned for want of jurisdiction vide order dated 24.12.2019. Since the trial court has not passed any adverse order against the petitioner and has only decided the point of jurisdiction, coupled with the fact that the parties were not in attendance and the counsel pleads no instruction, the instant petition is hereby dismissed in default for non-prosecution. JUDGE
